title: crotalaria bakeriana
intro: Crotalaria bakeriana is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to the Philippines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimalarial, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria bakeriana include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. Crotalaria bakeriana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal and health benefits.
